channel.title: My Experience on Nadia Zablah Humbert-Labeaumaz
channel.description: Recent content in My Experience on Nadia Zablah Humbert-Labeaumaz

item.title: Business Insights Host
item.description: Launched and hosted a discussion series exploring business and entrepreneurship, distilling practical lessons from real-world experiences while showcasing the work of social entrepreneurs.

item.title: Founder & Product Lead — Social Impact
item.description:
Launched a collaborative platform dedicated to environmental education and knowledge sharing, making complex environmental challenges more accessible and understandable, helping citizens and organizations make informed decisions.

Led the initiative from concept to early adoption, combining market research, content creation, platform development, and iterative product improvement.

item.title: Executive Advisor — Strategy & Transformation
item.description: Supported organizations across technology and regulated industries in navigating complex strategic, regulatory, and operational challenges by strengthening business models, refining market positioning, developing strategic plans, securing funding, and turning constraints into opportunities for growth.

item.title: Senior Program Manager — Growth & Performance
item.description:
Scaled the engineering department to support business growth by integrating local and offshore teams, strengthening alignment, and improving operational performance.

Partnered with executives and product leaders to define strategic priorities and align execution with business objectives.

item.title: Head of Engineering & Transformation
item.description:
Directed a cross-functional transformation programme involving approximately 40 people, aligning product, organization, and execution with the company’s strategic objectives.

Partnered with engineering, product, and business leaders to shape the strategic roadmap, align priorities, and strengthen product–market fit during a pivotal growth phase.

item.title: Senior Advisor — Strategy, Growth & Operations
item.description:
Advised technology companies on strategy, growth, organizational transformation, and performance.

Partnered with leaders and teams to solve complex business challenges, align priorities, and turn strategic objectives into measurable outcomes.

Shared practical insights through industry communities, events, and publications focused on strategy, leadership, change management, software engineering, and organizational effectiveness.

item.title: Founder & Managing Director
item.description:
Founded and led a consulting firm helping high-growth organizations overcome strategic, organizational, operational, and technological barriers to growth.

Built a diversified client portfolio, developed strategic partnerships, and led transformation initiatives addressing complex business challenges across multiple industries.

item.title: Technology Transformation Consultant
item.description:
Modernized a critical banking platform by translating complex technical challenges into a structured transformation roadmap, enabling the company to reduce risk and improve long-term sustainability.

Improved security, maintainability, scalability, and long-term platform resilience through targeted modernization initiatives.

item.title: Technology Community Founder & Leader
item.description:
Founded and led the Kotlin Lyon community in France, bringing together software professionals to share knowledge and advance expertise in the Kotlin programming language.

Built partnerships with local companies and industry experts to organize events and technical talks, contributing to knowledge sharing, technology adoption, and sustained community growth.

item.title: Engineering Practices Advocate
item.description:
Created a knowledge-sharing channel focused on software engineering, delivery excellence, and organizational effectiveness.

Produced educational content and shared practical insights to support continuous learning and professional development among technology professionals.

item.title: Founder — Compliance SaaS Platform
item.description:
Identified regulatory pressures affecting small businesses and developed a SaaS solution to simplify compliance and invoicing requirements.

Worked closely with entrepreneurs to understand operational constraints and translate complex legal requirements into practical, user-friendly product features.

item.title: Program Manager — Strategic Operations
item.description:
Orchestrated key initiatives for France’s nationwide Linky smart-meter programme, coordinating with more than 100 cross-functional stakeholders to support the deployment of millions of connected meters across regions.

Worked with engineering, product, and leadership teams to align priorities, strengthen delivery practices, and improve quality and reliability during a large-scale, multi-region rollout.

item.title: Delivery Lead — Biotechnology
item.description:
Led the delivery of a business-critical system for bioMérieux, supporting the release of medical reagent batches in a highly regulated biotechnology environment.

Acted as a bridge between scientific, technical, and operational teams to ensure reliable delivery while managing risk, cost constraints, and quality requirements.

item.title: Biotechnology Engineer — Reliability & Production Continuity
item.description:
Resolved a seven-year-old bottleneck threatening the continuity of a rare vaccine produced by Sanofi Pasteur due to obsolete verification equipment.

Optimized key measurement parameters to achieve statistical parity with the legacy system within weeks, enabling the safe replacement of obsolete equipment and ensuring uninterrupted product release under strict regulatory constraints.

item.title: Social Impact Project Leader
item.description:
Led a social impact initiative in Honduras focused on improving access to education through the renovation of a local school.

Brought together volunteers, secured funding, and coordinated local stakeholders to deliver a sustainable community development project.
